_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).
reference_document_element_description: Ability to prioritize data governance investments across competing data domains and business units with limited resources and uneven organizational maturity.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-012 (OP, cosine: 0.609), LS-S-012 (LS, cosine: 0.603).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.677). Shared vocabulary: [data, investments, prioritize]. DCWF-only terms [allocations, analytics, develop, helps, infrastructure, management] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, business, competing, domains, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.880, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and reso" and "Ability to prioritize data governance investments across competing data domains" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.626 < STS 0.677 (gap -0.051). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [allocations, analytics, develop] and [ability, across, business] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [data, investments, prioritize]. DCWF-only: [allocations, analytics, develop, helps, infrastructure, management]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, business, competing, domains, governance].
